title: epicampes stricta var. distichophylla
intro: Epicampes stricta var. distichophylla is a rare and lesser-known plant species that belongs to the family Zygophyllaceae and is native to the southwestern parts of the United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epicampes stricta var. distichophylla include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce swelling, and treat wounds, making it a valuable herb for treating various skin conditions and injuries. It is often prepared as a tincture or infused oil for topical application, and can also be consumed as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
